falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 79% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is invalidated because the August 2024 bottom was followed by a sustained rally without first revisiting the breakdown zone; a close above 5600 would indicate V-shape recovery rather than the W-bottom/consolidation structure implied by the pattern match

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 14.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The BLOWOFF SCORE of 39 suggests elevated stress/panic not yet washed out; sustained VIX sub-14 would indicate fear has fully dissipated and the 'bottom' call was premature—true capitulation bottoms maintain elevated volatility for weeks, not days

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% and holds there for 2+ consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The current signal implies a macro stress event where risk assets find bottom while yields remain elevated or rise (reflation/stagflation dynamic); a sustained sub-3.80% 10Y would signal deflationary panic or Fed pivot pricing, contradicting the 'bottom_2024_aug' analog which occurred during a yield surge, not collapse

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
